commands.review_summary:
The PR adds guarded doctor reporting for agent and bundle MCP runtime tool load/schema-normalization failures, plus focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +89, Tests +168. Total +257 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main calls runtime tool construction and schema normalization without local guards in the doctor runtime schema check, and the added tests exercise those thrown paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer PR is review-clean but needs human acceptance of compatibility-sensitive doctor health semantics before merge.

target.title: fix(doctor): report runtime tool schema errors
target.body:
## Summary

- rebuilds the doctor runtime tool-schema reporting slice directly on current `main` now that #88735 has landed
- converts agent runtime tool construction and normalization failures into `core/doctor/runtime-tool-schemas` findings instead of aborting doctor
- reports configured MCP runtime tool normalization failures without losing the existing pre-normalization schema diagnostics
- keeps the regression fixtures neutral with `fuzzplugin` names only

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime-errors.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts --reporter=verbose`: passed 1 shard / 33 tests
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime-errors.test.ts`: passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.json src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime-errors.test.ts`: passed
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`: passed
- added-line private-name scrub returned no `dofbot` / `doftbot` matches
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `openclaw doctor` now reports active runtime tool construction and schema normalization blockers instead of letting those failures abort the doctor runtime schema check.

Real environment tested: linked OpenClaw gwt worktree `doctor-runtime-schema-reporting-20260601` based on `origin/main` at `bb673f47b20`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: cherry-picked the previous doctor reporting commit onto current `main`, reran the focused doctor runtime schema tests, formatting, targeted lint, diff check, private-name scrub, and structured autoreview.

Evidence after fix: focused tests cover agent runtime tool construction failure, agent runtime tool normalization failure, unreadable active tool schema diagnostics, and configured MCP runtime normalization failure, all returning doctor findings instead of aborting.

Observed result after fix: doctor emits actionable `core/doctor/runtime-tool-schemas` errors with paths such as `agents.main.tools`, `tools.fuzzplugin_unreadable`, and `mcp.servers` while continuing other runtime schema checks.

What was not tested: full repository suite, completed `pnpm check:changed`, or a live external plugin process.
target.author: vincentkoc
